data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Call sheet generation' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for call sheet generation, yet there are no prior steps or evidence that demonstrate how the system generates call sheets or confirms their accuracy. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process for this requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the implementation of call sheet generation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for call sheet generation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system generates call sheets according to the specified requirements.
